.status-bar.background: rgb(15, 15, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(24, 24, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(24, 24, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(24, 24, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(31, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(24, 24, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(15, 15, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(15, 15, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(24, 24, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(15, 15, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgb(36, 7, 7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(15, 15, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
